title: selaginella kerstingii var. kerstingii
intro: Selaginella kerstingii var. kerstingii is a species of spore-producing plant in the genus Selaginella, commonly known as spikemoss. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Selaginella kerstingii var. kerstingii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and even exhibit antiviral activity. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant can be used in the form of tea, infusion, or tincture, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
